Each pass admits up to 4 people for free. Children 4 years and younger are admitted for free.
Pass instructions: Visit the museum’s website and use the library coupon code emailed to you to reserve a timed entry
Presently, online reservations are required for all visitors.
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
